description: Analyze the auction bidding data to clean inconsistent categories, remove duplicates, calculate win rates, identify emotional bidding patterns, and compute total spending. Save the final analysis to /home/ga/Documents/auction_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have exported auction bidding history from multiple platforms. The data is messy with inconsistent category names, duplicate entries, and missing shipping costs. Clean the data and calculate: (1) overall win rate percentage, (2) total money spent on won items, (3) bid ratio for each item (how close you bid to your maximum), and (4) flag items where you bid at 80% or more of your maximum (emotional bidding). Save your analysis.
